CreateEni.name: ENI name
CreateEni.subnetId: ID of the subnet the ENI belongs to
CreateEni.securityGroupIds: List of security group IDs to bind (mutually exclusive with enterpriseSecurityGroupIds)
CreateEni.enterpriseSecurityGroupIds: List of enterprise security group IDs to bind (mutually exclusive with securityGroupIds)
CreateEni.privateIpSet: List of private IPv4 addresses; exactly one entry must have primary=true
CreateEni.privateIpSet.primary: Whether this is the primary IP
CreateEni.privateIpSet.privateIpAddress: Private IPv4 address; empty string for auto-assignment
CreateEni.ipv6PrivateIpSet.primary: Whether this is the primary IPv6 address
CreateEni.ipv6PrivateIpSet.privateIpAddress: Private IPv6 address; empty string for auto-assignment

ListEni.vpcId: VPC ID the ENIs belong to
ListEni.name: Filter by ENI name
ListEni.privateIpAddress: Filter by private IP; multiple IPs comma-separated (single IP: suffix match, multiple IPs: exact match)
ListEni.maxKeys: Maximum results per page, up to 1000, default 1000

GetEni.desc: Get detailed information about a specific ENI

GetEniStatus.desc: Get the current status of an ENI

ModifyEniAttribute.desc: Update the name or description of an ENI (at least one must be provided)
ModifyEniAttribute.name: New ENI name

DeleteEni.eniId: ID of the ENI to delete

AttachEni.desc: Attach an ENI to a cloud instance
AttachEni.instanceId: ID of the instance to attach the ENI to

DetachEni.desc: Detach an ENI from a cloud instance
DetachEni.instanceId: ID of the instance to detach the ENI from

EniBindEip.desc: Bind an EIP to a private IP of an ENI
EniBindEip.privateIpAddress: Private IP address of the ENI to bind the EIP to

EniUnBindEip.desc: Unbind an EIP from an ENI

EniBindSg.desc: Update security groups bound to an ENI, replacing all existing security groups

EniBindEsg.desc: Update enterprise security groups bound to an ENI, replacing all existing security groups
EniBindEsg.enterpriseSecurityGroupIds: List of enterprise security group IDs

AddEniPrivateIp.desc: Add a secondary private IP to an ENI
AddEniPrivateIp.privateIpAddress: Private IP address to add; empty string for auto-assignment
AddEniPrivateIp.isIpv6: Whether to assign an IPv6 address (true=IPv6, default false=IPv4)

DeleteEniPrivateIp.desc: Delete a secondary private IP from an ENI
DeleteEniPrivateIp.privateIpAddress: Private IP address to delete (IPv4 or IPv6, secondary IPs only)

BatchAddEniPrivateIp.desc: Batch add secondary private IPs to an ENI, up to 10 per request
BatchAddEniPrivateIp.isIpv6: Whether to assign IPv6 addresses (true=IPv6, default false=IPv4)
BatchAddEniPrivateIp.privateIpAddressCount: Number of IPs to auto-assign, up to 10 (provide this or privateIpAddresses)
BatchAddEniPrivateIp.privateIpAddresses: List of specific IP addresses to assign, up to 10 (provide this or privateIpAddressCount)

BatchDeleteEniPrivateIp.desc: Batch delete secondary private IPs from an ENI, up to 10 per request
BatchDeleteEniPrivateIp.privateIpAddresses: List of private IP addresses to delete (IPv4 or IPv6, secondary IPs only)
